channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-08
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. Notably, the `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects have made administrative updates and synchronized changes with other repositories, respectively, to improve their functionality. Meanwhile, `docpluck` has addressed several issues, including rendering and diagnostic problems, and `coarse` has re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker. Additionally, `auto-zcurve` and `output-it-forward` have made updates to their validation notes and added a Chrome Webstore link, respectively. These connections between projects, such as the synchronization between `escicheck` and `escicheckapp`, highlight the collaborative spirit of our community and demonstrate the exciting advancements being made in open-source research tools. Overall, it's an exciting time for our community, with many projects making notable progress and improvements.

55 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck27 commits
metacheck19 commits
regcheck3 commits
statcheck2 commits
coarse2 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. This merge was done to incorporate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, administrative updates were made, as specified by the commit message "admin updates". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch that was worked on in these commits. The changes made in these commits are limited to the merge and administrative updates on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
